title: Operators Only!
description: Operators Only is similar to a second Whitelist, except it only allows /op'ed players online the server.
body:
**Operators Only**


A simple lightweight Fabric server tool for controlling access to your server!

- Easily toggle Operators Only mode with a command
  
- Lets you keep the server just for operators when needed
  
- Shows a clear message to anyone who can’t join  [ The server is in Operators Only mode. ]
  
- Great for maintenance, or testing!
  
- Server-side only no extra installs needed for players
